title: Bracket Editor
nextRoundsInfo: Subsequent rounds will be generated automatically when the competition is created

supercup.title: Supercup
supercup.description: Direct knockout with 6 manually selected teams. Seniors and Kempesitas play together.
supercup.step1Description: Select the 6 teams that will participate in the Supercup
supercup.step2Description: Drag teams to bracket positions. BYEs are predefined (1 upper, 1 lower).
supercup.successDescription: The Supercup has been created with 6 participating teams. Brackets have been generated correctly.

cindor.title: Cindor Cup
cindor.description: Direct knockout for Kempesitas category. All active teams participate.
cindor.step2Description: Drag teams to bracket positions. BYEs are distributed evenly.
cindor.successDescription: The Cindor Cup has been created. Brackets have been generated correctly with balanced BYE distribution.
cindor.byesDistribution: ({{upper}} in upper bracket, {{lower}} in lower bracket)
